title: AFCAT Preparation Strategy: Mastering Numerical Ability & Reasoning
author: DefenceRoger Editorial
data: The Air Force Common Admission Test (AFCAT) is the gateway to a thrilling career in the flying, technical, and ground duty branches of the IAF. To excel, focus on the Numerical Ability and Reasoning sections, which carry high weightage. Master mental math short-cuts, practice spatial and verbal reasoning questions, and maintain a high level of accuracy. Mock tests and regular revision of military aptitude questions are essential to clear the cutoff comfortably.
